text:
Corruption (, rom. Kurapushon) is a spell card found in the Greed Island game. It allows the caster to transform a card of the target that is B-Rank or higher into a D-Rank or lower card of their choice.
__NOTOC__

!Card Effect:
| colspan="3" align="center" |Transform one above-B ranked card from target player into a below-D card. The caster can choose the number of the new card. (After the transformation, the card counts towards the card number limit of the new card type. If the limit is already at MAX, or the target player has no above-B cards, the transformation fails and the “Corruption” card is destroyed). After the transformation, if the card is in an imposed slot with a wrong number, it auto-destroys.
|
|-
!How to Obtain:
| colspan="3" align="center" |Purchasable at the Spell Card Shop in Masadora.
|
|}

Summary

This spell allows the user to transform any B-Rank card or above to a D-Rank card or lower that the target player has. The user is able to designate the new card's number, but if it is maxed out, the spell will fail, as it will if the opponent has no B-Rank or higher cards. If the resulting card is in the wrong specified slot, it will be destroyed. This spell is designed to slow down other players from completing the game.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1022 :: 
対象プレイヤー１名のランクＢ以上のカードから１枚選んで、ランクＤ以下の好きな番号のカードに変身させる。（カード化限界枚数がＭＡＸの場合と対象プレイヤーにＢ以上のカードがない場合、「墜落」は破壊される。）変化後番号違いの指定ポケットに入っているカードは破壊される。
|-
![Eng]
|No.1022 :: Corruption 
Select 1 B-Rank or higher card from 1 named target player, to transform into a D-Rank or lower card with a number you like. (in the situation where the card transformation limit is MAX and the target player has no above B-Rank card, "Corruption" will be destroyed.) The card with a different number to the designated slot after the change will be destroyed.
|}

Trivia

This card is mentioned in Chapter 150 when Killua lists possible ways to obtain "Paladin's Necklace".
